summary: Decompiled and improved multiple Kinoko Route ground/stage functions, added Kinoko Route GroundVars structs and a recovered prototype, and added StageData/static data needed by grkinokoroute. Bot report shows 4 new matches, including grKinokoRoute_8020836C at 100%, plus several partial function and data-section improvements.

key_files.role: Main decompilation work: added includes/static data/StageData and implemented or improved Kinoko Route ground callbacks and helpers.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists new matches and improvements for main/melee/gr/grkinokoroute

key_files.role: Added typed Ground union arms for Kinoko Route state instead of accessing anonymous/raw state.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added grKinokoRoute_GroundVars_Entry, grKinokoRoute_GroundVars, grKinokoRoute_GroundVars2 and Ground union entries
raw_diff: UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS replaced with void grKinokoRoute_8020836C(HSD_GObj*, s32)

what_changed.text: Added Kinoko Route static data declarations, including grNKr_Depths, zero Vec3 grNKr_803B82E8, depths table grNKr_803B82F4, asset path /GrNKr.dat, and StageData grNKr_803E584C.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: additions near StageCallbacks in src/melee/gr/grkinokoroute.c

what_changed.text: Implemented grKinokoRoute_80207634 to collect route JObjs 0x7F-0x82 relative to origin JObj 0x94 and update camera bounds using Stage_GetCamBounds*Offset helpers.
Implemented grKinokoRoute_802078F0 using typed kinokoroute entries, current fighter position, inverse ground scale, and a loop over four entries to update JObj translation X/Y.
Implemented grKinokoRoute_80207B5C stage setup, initializing callbacks, flags, phase/zone/timer/spawn state, material setup, and saving reb0_pos with HSD_ASSERT.

Implemented a large partial grKinokoRoute_80207C88 camera/zone/transition routine using fighter position, ground points, stage_info.x6DC, camera target smoothing, item/material toggling helper calls, and mpLib update.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report shows grKinokoRoute_80207C88 improved from 0.00% to 85.48%

what_changed.text: Implemented grKinokoRoute_8020836C to toggle JObj flags, add/remove collision joints, and iterate item entities to update material for items of kind 0xA0.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report shows grKinokoRoute_8020836C 0.00% to 100.00%, +276 bytes

what_changed.text: Adjusted grKinokoRoute_80208564 to use GET_GROUND and copy depths from static grNKr_803B82F4 via a typed grNKr_Depths object.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report shows grKinokoRoute_80208564 99.97% to 100.00%

what_changed.text: Updated grkinokoroute.h from unknown signature to void grKinokoRoute_8020836C(HSD_GObj*, s32).

smart_moves.text: Recovered Kinoko Route-specific GroundVars structs before implementing state-heavy callbacks, making phase, spawn_idx, zone_idx, cam_timer, flags, entry positions, and JObj pointers explicit.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: accesses through gp->gv.kinokoroute and gp->gv.kinokoroute2

smart_moves.text: Used a natural loop for the four route entries in grKinokoRoute_802078F0 instead of repeating four nearly identical translation updates.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: for (i = 0; i < 4; i++, entry++) in grKinokoRoute_802078F0

smart_moves.text: Promoted a recovered function body signature into the owning header for grKinokoRoute_8020836C.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grKinokoRoute_8020836C implementation takes HSD_GObj* and s32

smart_moves.text: Used project helpers/macros such as GET_GROUND, HSD_ASSERT, HSD_JObjSetTranslate*, lbVector_* helpers, and Stage_* camera helpers rather than raw pointer math in the visible diff.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For stage callbacks with persistent per-stage state, recover a typed GroundVars union arm early; it makes later callback logic reviewable and avoids raw gp+offset access.
When a callback updates a fixed array of similar JObjs, a pointer-plus-counter loop can express the source cleanly and still make substantial matching progress.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report shows grKinokoRoute_802078F0 improved from 0.00% to 95.98%

decomp_lessons.lesson: Recovered function bodies should be paired with header prototype cleanup when the argument and return types are visible.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: header changed UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void grKinokoRoute_8020836C(HSD_GObj*, s32)

naming_conventions.text: Kinoko Route local GroundVars types use the stage prefix and descriptive suffixes: grKinokoRoute_GroundVars_Entry, grKinokoRoute_GroundVars, grKinokoRoute_GroundVars2.
Local variables use short project-role names where roles are clear, such as gp for Ground*, jobj/reb0_jobj for HSD_JObj*, fighter for HSD_GObj*, and cam_offset/cam_target for camera vectors.
Unrecovered global/static data kept address-style names such as grNKr_803B82E8, grNKr_803B82F4, grNKr_803E5840, and grNKr_803E584C rather than speculative semantic names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static data additions in grkinokoroute.c

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Used a static const struct-wrapped depths table and copied it into a local grNKr_Depths in grKinokoRoute_80208564, replacing an inline local s16 array.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report shows .rodata improvement and grKinokoRoute_80208564 reaching 100%

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Used PAD_STACK(16) inside grKinokoRoute_8020836C; bot report indicates the function matched 100%, but the slice does not explain why this padding was required.
Used HSD_ASSERT for recovered assert sites at lines 467, 617, and 654 rather than leaving expanded assert code.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_ASSERT uses in grKinokoRoute_80207B5C and grKinokoRoute_80207C88

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Matched data progress accompanied text progress: bot reports .sdata reached 100% and .data/.sdata2/.rodata improved, but the PR body does not separately justify data ownership decisions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added grNKr_803E5840, grNKr_803E584C, grNKr_803B82E8, grNKr_803B82F4
text_corpus: bot report .sdata +16 to 100%, .data to 88.68%, .sdata2 to 71.79%, .rodata to 97.44%

review_feedback.text: No human review comments were present in the loaded PR slice.
Automated bot reported matched-code gain of +760 bytes, matched-data gain of +16 bytes, 4 new matches, and 7 improvements in unmatched items.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs touching grKinokoRoute_80207C88 to see how the remaining 85.48% partial match was completed.
Search for PAD_STACK(16) in grKinokoRoute_8020836C or related stage helpers to determine whether the padding was later removed or documented.
Search for later renames of grNKr_803B82E8, grNKr_803B82F4, grNKr_803E5840, or grNKr_803E584C.
Search Kinoko Route GroundVars2 fields phase, spawn_idx, zone_idx, cam_timer, reb0_pos for later field-name refinements.
Search later grkinokoroute data-section PRs for explicit ownership evidence for /GrNKr.dat, grNKr_Depths, StageData, .sdata, .sdata2, and .rodata changes.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR metadata, changed files, merge state
raw_diff: full diff for three changed files
text_corpus: empty PR body and one decomp-dev bot report
notes: Diff evidence is strong for changed files, symbols, struct additions, signatures, and source forms.
Automated report provides matching percentages and byte deltas, including 100% matches for grKinokoRoute_8020836C, .sdata, grKinokoRoute_8020754C, and grKinokoRoute_80208564.
There is no PR body explanation and no human review feedback, so author intent, rationale for PAD_STACK, and data ownership decisions cannot be inferred beyond the diff and bot report.
Several functions are reported as partial improvements, not accepted full matches, so lessons should not claim full closure for grKinokoRoute_80207C88, 80207634, 802078F0, or 80207B5C.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recover typed GroundVars for state-heavy stage callbacks
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2435 shows Kinoko Route callback decomp using newly added grKinokoRoute_GroundVars and grKinokoRoute_GroundVars2 union arms, making route entries, phase, spawn index, zone index, camera timer, flags, and saved JObj position explicit in callback source.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Update owning headers when a recovered body proves a signature
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2435 replaced grKinokoRoute_8020836C's unknown header declaration with void grKinokoRoute_8020836C(HSD_GObj*, s32), matching the recovered implementation.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Fixed-entry JObj updates can use natural pointer/counter loops
accepted_candidate_records.text: grKinokoRoute_802078F0 loops over four typed entries to update JObj translations, and the bot reports the function improved from 0.00% to 95.98%.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: for-loop over entries in grKinokoRoute_802078F0

source_update_candidates.title: Kinoko Route ground source owns stage callback and GroundVars work
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2435 changed src/melee/gr/grkinokoroute.c, src/melee/gr/grkinokoroute.h, and src/melee/gr/types.h for Kinoko Route stage callback decomp and typed GroundVars recovery.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-scope fact for routing later Kinoko Route stage/ground decomp work; curator should verify against current source before adding.

source_update_candidates.title: Potential Kinoko Route data symbols and asset path
source_update_candidates.text: The diff adds grNKr_803E5840 as "/GrNKr.dat", StageData grNKr_803E584C, zero Vec3 grNKr_803B82E8, and depths table grNKr_803B82F4; bot report shows .sdata matched and data/rodata/sdata2 improvements.
source_update_candidates.reason: Possible data-sheet update, but PR evidence does not include explicit data ownership rationale; curator should verify symbols, sections, and current source.

source_update_candidates.title: PAD_STACK usages need explicit rationale even when a function matches
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2435 uses PAD_STACK(16) in grKinokoRoute_8020836C and the bot reports the function as 100% matched, but the loaded slice does not explain the necessity or blast radius of the padding.
source_update_candidates.reason: This aligns with the existing matching-tactics-need-evidence standard; curator may want a searchable example, not a new accepted rule.

rejection_notes: Do not infer human reviewer approval rationale; no human reviews or review comments are present.
Do not claim grKinokoRoute_80207C88, grKinokoRoute_80207634, grKinokoRoute_802078F0, or grKinokoRoute_80207B5C fully matched; the bot report lists them as partial improvements.
Do not promote the static data names or section ownership as final beyond the diff; the PR body provides no data ownership explanation.
Do not treat PAD_STACK(16) as generally acceptable style from this PR alone; evidence only shows it existed in a function the bot reported as matched.
